overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of ancient Ephesus in Assassin's Creed Odyssey's Discovery Tour mode, exploring Greek temples, an amphitheater, and the Temple of Artemis with detailed stone architecture and NPC pedestrians in ancient Greek attire.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek stoa with decorative animal frieze

events.description: NPC pedestrians enter frame from left and right, walking past the stoa

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone pavement exploring the perimeter of the temple stoa

notable_agents.action: man in white tunic walking past the stoa from left to right
woman in brown dress walking along the path toward the camera

entered.detail: rectangular stone building with Doric columns and decorated frieze featuring animal reliefs
irregular stone tile pathway with grass growing between cracks
dense flowering shrubs with white blossoms lining the building base
single ornate stone column with fabric drapery tied around the capital

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit ancient Greek stoa with decorative friezes and flowering bushes. The camera walks steadily along the stone pavement as NPCs in period clothing walk past, exploring the temple architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open amphitheater with stone tiered seating

events.description: exits the covered stoa area into the open amphitheater space with visible stone seating

agents.ego_description: approaching the amphitheater, passing other pedestrians and a dog near the theater entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three people walking together toward the amphitheater steps
dog walking near the theater steps alongside the pedestrians

entered.detail: semicircular stone tiered seating built into the hillside
large draped fabric canopy suspended between stone columns
wide stone staircase leading up to the theater entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open amphitheater area with stone seating tiers built into the hillside. The camera moves toward the theater entrance, passing under a draped canopy and approaching the stone steps where pedestrians and a dog are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental gateway with painted ceiling beams

events.description: approaching the propylaea gateway with massive stone columns
passing under the covered gateway ceiling, looking up at painted red and blue beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the monumental gateway, pausing to look up at the ornate painted ceiling before continuing

notable_agents.action: person in armor walking ahead through the gateway toward the temple courtyard

entered.detail: massive monumental gateway with tall fluted columns and decorated entablature
intricately painted wooden ceiling with red beams and blue decorative panels
large blue tapestry with gold emblem hanging between gateway columns

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes through a monumental stone gateway (propylaea) with massive columns. While passing through, the view looks up to reveal an ornate painted wooden ceiling with red beams, then emerges toward the temple courtyard ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Temple of Artemis with massive stone columns

events.description: emerging from the gateway into the temple courtyard with full view of the Temple of Artemis
circling around the right side of the temple to view the structure from different angles

agents.ego_description: approaching the Temple of Artemis, examining the massive columns and ornate facade, then circling around the perimeter

entered.detail: massive Greek temple with tall fluted columns and decorated pediment
gigantic fluted stone columns with ornate capitals supporting the temple roof
broad stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
smaller auxiliary building with columns to the right of the main temple

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the gateway to reveal the massive Temple of Artemis with its towering stone columns. The view approaches the temple steps, looks up at the ornate facade and decorative friezes, then circles around the right side showing the scale of the structure and a smaller side shrine.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior temple courtyard with peristyle columns and open roof

events.description: entering the covered interior courtyard of the side shrine
moving from bright exterior into shadowed interior with light filtering from open roof above

agents.ego_description: entering the inner temple sanctuary, approaching an NPC standing by the columns and looking up at the open roof

notable_agents.action: armored guard with round shield standing in the temple interior facing the altar wall

entered.detail: covered courtyard space with stone floor and walls
rows of stone columns supporting the roof on all sides
square opening in the roof revealing sky and rocky cliff above
decorative carved frieze on the interior back wall with figures

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the interior courtyard of a smaller shrine, revealing a peristyle colonnade with an open roof skylight showing the rocky cliff above. An armored NPC stands near the back wall which features decorative friezes, while the camera looks up at the architectural details of the ceiling and open roof.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit ancient Greek city, transitioning from a decorative colonnade into a grand ceremonial gateway. It begins by walking steadily along a stone stoa adorned with flowering bushes and decorative friezes, passing NPCs in period clothing. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a hillside amphitheater area, gliding past draped canopies and stone seating tiers where pedestrians and a dog are visible. The movement then leads directly toward a monumental stone gateway, passing beneath massive columns and glancing upward at an ornate painted wooden ceiling with red beams. Finally, the camera emerges from the propylaea to reveal the expansive temple courtyard ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the grand exterior of a massive temple to the intimate, enclosed courtyard of a smaller shrine. It begins by emerging from a gateway to reveal the towering stone columns and ornate facade of the Temple of Artemis, gliding toward the steps to capture the decorative friezes. The camera then circles around the right side of the structure to emphasize its scale before shifting focus toward a smaller side shrine. As the movement continues, the scene opens into the interior courtyard of this shrine, passing through a peristyle colonnade toward an armored NPC standing against a decorated back wall. Finally, the view tilts upward, moving from the architectural details of the ceiling to the open roof skylight that reveals the rocky cliff above.
